newsSince: No new fundamental news since June 9. UBS raised its PT to $2,125 (Buy) on June 8, just before the window, citing data-center-led demand persisting into 2027 and a $12.45B backlog (up from $6.89B). Stock +8.0% since June 9 on continued momentum.

sources.label: UBS raises Comfort Systems PT to $2,125 / backlog $12.45B (TipRanks)
FIX backlog and data-center demand (Yahoo Finance)

verdicts.rankRationale: No new fundamental information since June 9; the $12.45B backlog and UBS $2,125 PT (Jun 8) predate the window. On this residual-alpha lens FIX sits in the Monitor/benchmark bucket - strong but crowded (90% Strong Buy, +97% YTD) and outside the core passive/power stack. +8% is momentum, not thesis change. Hold.
verdicts.bull: Backlog nearly doubled to $12.45B on AI/cloud data-center HVAC; modular/prefab capacity scaling; demand visibility into 2027.
verdicts.neutral: Already widely owned and richly valued after +97% YTD; HVAC-construction sits adjacent to, not inside, the power bottleneck.
verdicts.bear: Extreme crowding, stretched technicals/valuation, insider selling; data-center construction cycle could roll over.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Continued backlog conversion and data-center bookings
